title: Michael Byrne
text: Home * People * Michael Byrne Michael B [1] Michael (Mike) Byrne , an American now retired certified public accountant and finance manager, in 1983 graduated from University of Pennsylvania [2] , and further chess player and computer chess aficionado. He wrote computer chess articles for Computer Chess Reports in the 90s, and served as moderator in CCC . He is member of the Crafty team around Robert Hyatt . More recently, he plays around with a derivative of Senpai 1.0 by Fabien Letouzey , dubbed Kōhai [3] [4] , the Gull 3 fork dubbed Hawkeye [5] , and a Stockfish fork with Cerebellum book, dubbed McBrain [6] aka McCain , Burnzie [7] and Honey .
